results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√daṃś P. -daśati, to bite together, seize with the teeth,  MBh. ;  R. ;  BhP. ;
to press together, compress, press closely on anything, indent by pressure,  MBh. ;  Kālid.

results.rendered_html:
saṃdaṃś 1 P.
1 To bite, sting; saṃdaṣṭādharapallavā  Amaru. 32. 
2 (a) To stick or adhere closely to, cling; urasā saṃdaṣṭasarpatvacā  Ś. 7. 11 ; saṃdaṣṭavastreṣvabalānitaṃbeṣu  R. 16. 65 , 48.  (b) To press together, crush by pressure; saṃdaṣṭakusumaśayanāni gātrāṇi  Ś. 3. 18.
